title: Dead Man
synopsis:
“And your poetry will now be written with blood.”
In the 19th century, Accountant William Blake travels to a frontier town, only to find his job gone. After killing the boss's son in self-defense, the fatally wounded Blake escapes into the wilderness. Guided by Nobody, an outcast Native American who mistakes him for the poet, and pursued by ruthless bounty hunters, Blake transforms into an outlaw. Described by Jarmusch as a "psychedelic western,” the film features Neil Young’s improvised score and deeply meditates on mortality.

synopsis_lang.en:
“And your poetry will now be written with blood.”
In the 19th century, Accountant William Blake travels to a frontier town, only to find his job gone. After killing the boss's son in self-defense, the fatally wounded Blake escapes into the wilderness. Guided by Nobody, an outcast Native American who mistakes him for the poet, and pursued by ruthless bounty hunters, Blake transforms into an outlaw. Described by Jarmusch as a "psychedelic western,” the film features Neil Young’s improvised score and deeply meditates on mortality.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
「你的詩將會用鮮血來寫成。」
十九世紀末，會計師威廉布萊克前往西部小鎮，卻發現工作已落空，衝突中錯手殺死老闆兒子，胸口中彈逃入荒野，遇上一個流浪的印第安人。對方以為他是同名的英國詩人，決心引路同行。賞金獵人窮追不捨，威廉神推鬼㧬從文弱書生蛻變成亡命之徒。占渣木殊形容為「迷幻西部片」，伴隨Neil Young的即興配樂，逃亡之旅昇華至詩意的超脫儀式，體悟命運與死亡的真諦。

cast: Johnny Depp, Gary Farmer, Lance Henriksen

cast_lang.en: Johnny Depp, Gary Farmer, Lance Henriksen
cast_lang.zh_hk: Johnny Depp, Gary Farmer, Lance Henriksen
